generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and responsibility, you know how important it is to have strong domestic security measures. Recent events show that our current laws are outdated and can't keep up with modern threats. Expanding security powers isn't about restricting freedoms - it's about protecting them. Other countries are already doing this, and we can't afford to fall behind. #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
